sections.sectionTitle: Topa in A Mite A Hotkhiatna

verses.text: Singkung lopa a sel hunin Topa kiang pan guah ngen un. Meii kaisakin, guah zusak a, ankung khempeuh a dumsakpa, Topa ahi hi

Mihingte in milim peuh thudotin nei uh a, a thu ngahte uh zuauthu leh a mawkna hi lel hi. Mang khiathei-a kineite in lam lakkhial uh a, amau' hehnepnate a mawknapi hi lel hi. Tua ahih manin tuu bangin mite mangthang uh a, makai a neihloh manun gimna a ngah uh hi
Ka mi a makaite tungah ka heh suak mahmah a, amaute gim ka pia ding hi. Judah mite pen Vanglian Topa ahi keima-a' hi a, amaute limtakin kemin, ka sakol galkap thahatte a suak ding uh hi
Amaute sung pan mi makaite, galkapmangte, gam ukte, hong khangkhia ding uh hi
Kongzing buannawng lakah a galte uh a tuancilgawp galkapte bangin amaute gualzo ding uh a, Topa in a ompih manin amaute in gal a sim uh ciangin a galte' sakol galkapte zogawp ding uh hi

Judah mite ka thahatsak ding a, Israel mite ka honkhia ding hi. Amaute ka khasiat ding a, inn-ah ka ciahpih ding hi. Amaute cikmah hunin ka nial ngeiloh bang keekin nuamtakin a om ding uh hi. Kei pen Topa, amau' Pasian ka hi a, amau' thungetnate ka pia ding hi
Israel mite, galkap hatte bang ding uh a, zukham lungnuam, bang ding uh hi. A suan a khakte un hih gualzawhna phawkin lungdam ding uh a, Topa' bawlna hangin kipak ding uh hi
Amaute samin ka kaikhawm ding a, amaute honkhia-in a nidang zahin mi tampi ka phasak ding hi
Minam dangte lakah amaute ka thehthang hangin a gamlapi panin kei hong phawk ding uh hi. Amaute leh a tate uh suakta-in, a vekpi-un inn zuanin hong ciahkhawm ding uh hi
Egypt leh Assiria gam panin amaute ka ciahpih kik ding a, a gam a lei uhah ka tengsak ding hi. Gilead gam leh Lebanon gamah zong ka tengsak ding a, gam khempeuhah mi a dim ding hi
Amaute in lungkhamna tuipi a phutkhak uh ciangin keimah in tuihualte ka vatmai ding a, Nail gun tuithukte kangcip ding hi. Assiria mite ka niamkhiat ding a, Egypt in a vangliatna taan ding hi
Ka mite ka thahatsak ding a, amaute in kei hong bia-in ka thu hong mang ding uh hi, Topa in ci hi.
